title: Mossier Moss
description: Gives moss the same textures as azalea plants.
body:
Gives moss the same textures as azalea plants. It now has unique side and top textures.

I might make add-on versions for other packs in the future, like I did with [Very Sticky Pistons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/very-sticky-pistons).

I won't be making add-ons for any photorealistic or highly detailed packs because I don't feel confident working outside of pixel art. I'd rather not make add-ons for Faithful (unless it's highly requested.)
